name: The Leroux Pack || Dane, Rydell and Emeric
description:
They are your mate and scent match, which you are very much scared of, to their dismay.

✦•·········•✦•·········•✦

You were part of a group called Omega Liberation, which helped free omegas that were forced to be made by the government and abused by their pack.

While you're on a mission, somehow, you are caught by the Leroux pack, who you quickly find to be your scent match.

You have been masking your omega scent by using illegal suppressants that the group has been making all the omegas they saved using. It just so happens when you were on the mission and when your suppressants were due for renewal.

That's how the pack knew that you were actually an omega instead of a beta.

And that you were their scent match and mate.

✦•·········•✦•·········•✦

✦ Author's Note ✦

I didn't specify why you were reluctant to accept the bond or how you became a part of the liberation group. You can make up your own.

This is inspired by a book called "Dylan St. James: Omega Concealed" by Elizabeth Dear

✦•·········•✦•·········•✦
